body_txt: In its basic form, a person who sells weaponry. This results in a large variety of sub-types of these characters:  These characters are generally depicted as slimy merchants of death, making money from brutal wars and providing the means to prolong conflicts. They may be inclined to start a War for Fun and Profit , hoping to make money from selling weapons. Should there be no conflict at all, they may even take one step further and start one themselves . Sometimes, a potential customer may kill them and take their weapons . Two more benign ones appear in specific settings, who escape this villainous depiction: Compare Arms Fair (a market of military items). Not to confuse with Death Dealer , people who use playing cards as weapons, although as the aforementioned "merchants of death" thing shows, arms dealers are often referred to by the same term or variations thereof.
